assertions: D10: Multi-turn chatbot conversation remains consistent, respecting same selected language.

vision_verdict: pass. The interface displays a consistent linguistic consistency, as the entire environment, including the navigation sidebar, the sandbox control header, the primary informational text, and the active welcome overlay, is presented uniformly in English. The layout is well-structured with clear, distinct sections; the sidebar serves as a functional navigation pillar while the main content area utilizes a clean, hierarchical design to present the welcome modal and library options. All textual elements align with the selected language setting, ensuring a cohesive user experience within this dedicated sandbox view.
